title: Swarm session accounting swallows manifest errors on both ends: dispatcher discards Register error (orphan session invisible to crash-safe reaper) and Reap discards MarkReaped error (stale-live manifest, never surfaced in rep.Errors)
summary: (1) swarm/dispatcher.go:172 — the pre-registration write that guarantees a spawned tmux session is known to the reaper BEFORE launch is `_ =` discarded; if persist fails, the session launches anyway and escapes the registry-based crash reap (pid-token sweep is the only backstop). (2) swarm/kill.go:104 — `_ = reg.MarkReaped(h.WorkerID)` after kill; on persist failure the manifest still says StatusLive, the worker appears in rep.Killed, and the divergence is invisible (never appended to rep.Errors).
root_cause: Manifest persistence treated as best-effort telemetry when it is actually the reaper's source of truth — the pre-registration guarantee only holds if its failure aborts or loudly degrades the dispatch.
fix: (1) Register failure → abort that worker's dispatch with a wrapped error (pre-registration is the invariant; launching unregistered is the bug). (2) MarkReaped failure → append to rep.Errors ('%s: mark-reaped: %v') while keeping the worker in rep.Killed (kill succeeded; persistence didn't). No behavioral change on healthy paths.
acceptance: RED: TestDispatch_RegisterFailureAbortsWorkerLaunch — registry fake errors on Register; launcher never invoked for that worker; error surfaced (fails today: launch proceeds)
RED: TestReap_MarkReapedError_ReportedInErrors — registry fake errors on MarkReaped; rep.Errors carries it, rep.Killed still includes the worker
operator_note: RESOLVED 2026-07-14 in commit 2444f7b7 (operator-implemented, gated ship --class manual). Both _= swallows fixed: dispatcher.go Register failure now aborts the worker before spawn with a wrapped 'pre-register session' error; kill.go MarkReaped failure now appends '%s: mark-reaped: %v' to rep.Errors while keeping the worker in rep.Killed. Tests (session_accounting_test.go): TestLaunchWorker_RegisterFailure_AbortsBeforeLaunch + TestReap_MarkReapedFailure_SurfacedInErrors, real error injection (manifest parent = regular file → persistLocked MkdirAll fails), RED-proven then GREEN under -race; go-reviewer Approve + code-simplifier clean. Also corrected the stale Dispatch orphan-on-cancel doc. FOLLOW-UP escalated: registry-persist-then-commit-transactionality 0.72 (go-reviewer found upsert-before-persist leaves a phantom in-memory entry on persist failure). Weight dropped 0.86->0.05 (done).
